allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ABI functions:', [x['name'] for x in d['abi'] if x['type']=='function']\); print\('Bytecode size:', len\(d['bytecode']\)//2, 'bytes'\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const k = process.env.DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY; console.log\('Key loaded:', k ? 'YES \(' + k.length + ' chars\)' : 'NO - check .env file'\); console.log\('RPC:', process.env.MEZO_RPC_URL || 'NOT SET'\);")
